hero.title: Websites, ecommerce, SaaS, and AI systems built around real business needs
hero.subtitle: Qovre supports businesses in the Netherlands with scalable websites, ecommerce, custom platforms, automation, chatbots, and technical SEO/GEO.

services.sectionSubtitle: From business websites to AI automation and technical discoverability.

process.sectionSubtitle: From first conversation to live environment — transparent, step by step.

discovery.title: Intake
discovery.description: We map your situation, goals, and constraints. No assumptions, just sharp questions.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Based on the intake, we determine approach, architecture, and scope. You see exactly what will be built.

development.title: Build
development.description: We build in sprints with incremental delivery. You follow progress and give feedback where needed.

launch.title: Delivery
launch.description: Thorough testing, handover, and go-live. Including technical documentation and onboarding.

growth.title: Continuity
growth.description: Maintenance, further development, and support when needed. No forced contracts.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Briefly describe what you want to build. A suitable intake form or proposal path can follow after that.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within one business day.
